category.scope_note: Household refrigerating appliances comparison: China domestic compliance vs Kenya KEBS PVoC, KS IEC 60335-2-24 safety, and EPRA/KEBS energy efficiency requirements.

title.en: China-to-Kenya Household Refrigerator Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国家用电冰箱进入肯尼亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國家用電冰箱進入肯亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese household refrigerator compliance (CCC, GB 4706.13, GB 12021.2) against Kenya KEBS requirements: mandatory PVoC Certificate of Conformity, KS IEC 60335-2-24 safety, EPRA/KEBS energy efficiency labelling, R-600a refrigerant handling, and in-country importer obligations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国家用电冰箱合规（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）与肯尼亚KEBS要求差距对照：强制性PVoC符合性证书、KS IEC 60335-2-24安全标准、EPRA/KEBS能效标识、R-600a制冷剂处理及本地进口商义务。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國家用電冰箱合規（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）與肯亞KEBS要求差距對照：強制性PVoC符合性證書、KS IEC 60335-2-24安全標準、EPRA/KEBS能效標識、R-600a製冷劑處理及本地進口商義務。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment-body determination, customs ruling, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Kenyan legislation, KEBS PVoC requirements, applicable KS/IEC standards, EPRA energy efficiency thresholds, and refrigerant provisions with qualified professionals before shipment or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定机构裁定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士核验现行肯尼亚法律、KEBS PVoC要求、适用的KS/IEC标准、EPRA能效门槛值及制冷剂条款。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定機構裁定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行肯亞法律、KEBS PVoC要求、適用的KS/IEC標準、EPRA能效門檻值及製冷劑條款。

answer_first.en: Chinese household refrigerator manufacturers face four major Kenya compliance gaps: (1) every regulated shipment must clear KEBS Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVoC) and obtain a Certificate of Conformity (CoC) per consignment before loading at the Chinese port — CCC certification does not exempt this; (2) electrical safety must be demonstrated to KS IEC 60335-2-24 (Kenya adopts IEC, so the underlying technical basis is close to China's GB 4706.13, but conformity is assessed by a KEBS-appointed PVoC agent, not by CCC); (3) energy efficiency must meet the EPRA/KEBS minimum energy performance standard and carry the local energy efficiency label — Kenya has its own label, distinct from the China Energy Label; and (4) an in-country (Kenyan) importer is required to receive goods and present them for clearance at Mombasa. R-600a refrigerant is broadly accepted; Kenya has no EU-style horizontal RoHS/F-Gas regime, so refrigerant control sits inside the product safety standard rather than a standalone law.
answer_first.zh: 中国家用电冰箱制造商面临四大肯尼亚合规差距：（1）每批受管制货物在中国港口装船前须通过KEBS出口前符合性验证（PVoC）并按批取得符合性证书（CoC）——CCC认证不豁免此项；（2）电气安全须依据KS IEC 60335-2-24证明（肯尼亚采用IEC，故底层技术基础与中国GB 4706.13接近，但合格评定由KEBS委派的PVoC代理机构执行，而非CCC）；（3）能效须满足EPRA/KEBS最低能效标准并加贴本地能效标签——肯尼亚有独立于中国能效标识的本地标签；（4）须有肯尼亚境内进口商接收货物并在蒙巴萨办理清关。R-600a制冷剂被广泛接受；肯尼亚无欧盟式横向RoHS/氟气体法规，故制冷剂管控置于产品安全标准内，而非独立法律。
answer_first.zht: 中國家用電冰箱製造商面臨四大肯亞合規差距：（1）每批受管制貨物在中國港口裝船前須通過KEBS出口前符合性驗證（PVoC）並按批取得符合性證書（CoC）——CCC認證不豁免此項；（2）電氣安全須依據KS IEC 60335-2-24證明（肯亞採用IEC，故底層技術基礎與中國GB 4706.13接近，但合格評定由KEBS委派的PVoC代理機構執行，而非CCC）；（3）能效須滿足EPRA/KEBS最低能效標準並加貼本地能效標籤——肯亞有獨立於中國能效標識的本地標籤；（4）須有肯亞境內進口商接收貨物並在蒙巴薩辦理清關。R-600a製冷劑被廣泛接受；肯亞無歐盟式橫向RoHS/氟氣體法規，故製冷劑管控置於產品安全標準內，而非獨立法律。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set to true. Official regulator (KEBS, EPRA, Communications Authority of Kenya), standards body, or primary legal source preferred.
